message:
test(fj-conformance): add comprehensive oracle tests for Log1p primitive

Adds 27 tests for log(1+x) covering zero, positive/negative values,
numerical stability for small x, domain boundaries (x=-1 gives -inf,
x<-1 gives NaN), infinity handling, monotonicity, and expm1 inverse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
